question: Data from a historically important study by Sir Richard Doll published in 1955 are used to illustrate techniques in this chapter. This study looked at lung cancer mortality rates by region (response variable) according to per capita cigarette consumption (explanatory variable). Table 14.2 lists the data.
answer: We will inspect the relationship between cigarette consumption $(X)$ and lung cancer mortality $(Y)$ with graphical explorations, numerical summaries, and inferential techniques.

meta info.caption: Data (Doll’s ecological study of smoking and lung cancer).
